006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.rdf.config;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
021import org.apache.juneau.marshall.html.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.*;
036
037/**
038 * Identical to {@link BasicUniversalConfig} but includes RDF marshalling support.
039 *
040 * <p>
041 *    Default settings defined:
042 * </p>
043 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
044 *    <li class='ja'>{@link Rest}:
045 *       <ul>
046 *          <li class='jma'>{@link Rest#serializers() serializers}:
047 *             <ul class='javatree'>
048 *                <li class='jc'>{@link HtmlDocSerializer}
049 *                <li class='jc'>{@link HtmlStrippedDocSerializer}
050 *                <li class='jc'>{@link HtmlSchemaDocSerializer}
051 *                <li class='jc'>{@link JsonSerializer}
052 *                <li class='jc'>{@link Json5Serializer}
053 *                <li class='jc'>{@link JsonSchemaSerializer}
054 *                <li class='jc'>{@link XmlDocSerializer}
055 *                <li class='jc'>{@link UonSerializer}
056 *                <li class='jc'>{@link UrlEncodingSerializer}
057 *                <li class='jc'>{@link OpenApiSerializer}
058 *                <li class='jc'>{@link MsgPackSerializer}
059 *                <li class='jc'>{@link SoapXmlSerializer}
060 *                <li class='jc'>{@link PlainTextSerializer}
061 *                <li class='jc'>{@link RdfXmlSerializer}
062 *                <li class='jc'>{@link RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer}
063 *                <li class='jc'>{@link TurtleSerializer}
064 *                <li class='jc'>{@link NTripleSerializer}
065 *                <li class='jc'>{@link N3Serializer}
066 *                <li class='jc'>{@link JsonLdSerializer}
067 *                <li class='jc'>{@link NQuadsSerializer}
068 *                <li class='jc'>{@link TriGSerializer}
069 *                <li class='jc'>{@link TriXSerializer}
070 *                <li class='jc'>{@link RdfJsonSerializer}
071 *             </ul>
072 *          </li>
073 *          <li class='jma'>{@link Rest#parsers() parsers}:
074 *             <ul class='javatree'>
075 *                <li class='jc'>{@link JsonParser}
076 *                <li class='jc'>{@link Json5Parser}
077 *                <li class='jc'>{@link XmlParser}
078 *                <li class='jc'>{@link HtmlParser}
079 *                <li class='jc'>{@link UonParser}
080 *                <li class='jc'>{@link UrlEncodingParser}
081 *                <li class='jc'>{@link OpenApiParser}
082 *                <li class='jc'>{@link MsgPackParser}
083 *                <li class='jc'>{@link PlainTextParser}
084 *                <li class='jc'>{@link RdfXmlParser}
085 *                <li class='jc'>{@link TurtleParser}
086 *                <li class='jc'>{@link NTripleParser}
087 *                <li class='jc'>{@link N3Parser}
088 *                <li class='jc'>{@link JsonLdParser}
089 *                <li class='jc'>{@link NQuadsParser}
090 *                <li class='jc'>{@link TriGParser}
091 *                <li class='jc'>{@link TriXParser}
092 *                <li class='jc'>{@link RdfJsonParser}
093 *             </ul>
094 *          </li>
095 *          <li class='jma'>{@link Rest#config() config}:  <js>"$S{juneau.configFile,SYSTEM_DEFAULT}"</js>
096 *    </ul>
097 * </li>
098 *    <li class='ja'>{@link MarshalledConfig}:
099 *       <ul>
100 *          <li class='jma'>{@link BeanConfig#ignoreUnknownBeanProperties() ignoreUnknownBeanProperties}:  <js>"true"</js>
101 *       </ul>
102 *    </li>
103 *    <li class='ja'>{@link SerializerConfig}:
104 *       <ul>
105 *          <li class='jma'>{@link SerializerConfig#uriResolution() uriResolution}:  <js>"ROOT_RELATIVE"</js>
106 *       </ul>
107 *    </li>
108 *    <li class='ja'>{@link HtmlDocConfig}:
109 *       <ul>
110 *          <li class='jma'>{@link HtmlDocConfig#header() header}:  <js>"&lt;h1&gt;$RS{title}&lt;/h1&gt;&lt;h2&gt;$RS{operationSummary,description}&lt;/h2&gt;$C{REST/header}"</js>
111 *          <li class='jma'>{@link HtmlDocConfig#navlinks() navlinks}:  <js>"up: request:/.."</js>
112 *          <li class='jma'>{@link HtmlDocConfig#stylesheet() stylesheet}:  <js>"$C{REST/theme,servlet:/htdocs/themes/devops.css}"</js>
113 *          <li class='jma'>{@link HtmlDocConfig#head() head}:  <js>"$C{REST/head}"</js>
114 *          <li class='jma'>{@link HtmlDocConfig#footer() footer}:  <js>"$C{REST/footer}"</js>
115 *          <li class='jma'>{@link HtmlDocConfig#nowrap() nowrap}:  <js>"true"</js>
116 *       </ul>
117 *    </li>
118 * </ul>
119 *
120 * <p>
121 *    This annotation can be applied to REST resource classes to define common default configurations:
122 * </p>
123 * <p class='bjava'>
124 *    <jc>// Used on a top-level resource.</jc>
125 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>
126 *    <jk>public class</jk> MyResource <jk>extends</jk> RestServlet <jk>implements</jk> BasicUniversalJenaConfig { ... }
127 * </p>
128 * <p class='bjava'>
129 *    <jc>// Used on a child resource.</jc>
130 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>
131 *    <jk>public class</jk> MyResource <jk>extends</jk> RestResource <jk>implements</jk> BasicUniversalJenaConfig { ... }
132 * </p>
133 *
134 * <p>
135 *    Note that the framework will aggregate annotations defined on all classes in the class hierarchy with
136 *    values defined on child classes overriding values defined on parent classes.  That allows any values defined
137 *    on this interface to be overridden by annotations defined on the implemented class.
138 * </p>
139 *
140 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
141 *    <ul class='javatreec'>
142 *       <li class='jc'>{@link BasicRestServlet}
143 *       <li class='jc'>{@link BasicRestServletGroup}
144 *       <li class='jc'>{@link BasicRestResource}
145 *       <li class='jc'>{@link BasicRestResourceGroup}
146 * </ul>
147 *    <li class='link'>{doc jrs.AnnotatedClasses}
148 * </ul>
149 */
150// @formatter:off
151@Rest(
152   serializers={
153      RdfXmlSerializer.class,
154      RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer.class,
155      TurtleSerializer.class,
156      NTripleSerializer.class,
157      N3Serializer.class,
158      JsonLdSerializer.class,
159      NQuadsSerializer.class,
160      TriGSerializer.class,
161      TriXSerializer.class,
162      RdfJsonSerializer.class,
163      RdfThriftSerializer.class,
164      RdfProtoSerializer.class
165   },
166   parsers={
167      RdfXmlParser.class,
168      TurtleParser.class,
169      NTripleParser.class,
170      N3Parser.class,
171      JsonLdParser.class,
172      NQuadsParser.class,
173      TriGParser.class,
174      TriXParser.class,
175      RdfJsonParser.class,
176      RdfThriftParser.class,
177      RdfProtoParser.class
178   }
179)
180public interface BasicUniversalJenaConfig extends BasicUniversalConfig {}
